metadata.title: Up Around The Bend
metadata.lyrics:
[00:15.32] There's a place up ahead and I'm going

[00:33.12] We're going up around the bend, ooh

[00:42.92] Better get while the getting's good
[00:46.51] Hitch a ride to the end of the highway
[00:50.19] Where the neon turn to wood
[00:53.71] Come on the rising wind
[00:57.03] We're going up around the bend, ooh
[01:03.07] You can ponder perpetual motion
